label: Layout scatter terrain parms
description: Parameters for scattering terrain patches randomly inside a room. The element name is the TerrainDef defName (the 'def' field).

def.label: Terrain
def.description: TerrainDef to scatter. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

groupCount.label: Group count
groupCount.description: Fixed number of groups to place. Uses IntRange.Invalid to derive count from groupsPerHundredCells instead.

groupsPerHundredCells.label: Groups per hundred cells
groupsPerHundredCells.description: Random range for how many scatter groups appear per 100 room cells. Used when groupCount is invalid.

itemsPerGroup.label: Items per group
itemsPerGroup.description: Random range for how many terrain cells appear in each scatter group.

groupDistRange.label: Group dist range
groupDistRange.description: Random range for the spread radius of cells within a scatter group.

minGroups.label: Min groups
minGroups.description: Minimum number of groups that must be placed regardless of cell count.
